scenario_description: The user says to change the spreadsheet title but doesn't say what to change it to. The agent asks, then only changes A1.

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Help me change the spreadsheet title
Only change cell A1 to 'Sales Report 2025', leave all other rows unchanged, then save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/SalesRep.xlsx', header=None); print('PASSED' if 'Sales Report 2025' in str(df.iloc[0, 0]) else 'FAILED')"
